title: World Regions Enter Major Early Eras

In Maritime Southeast Asia, the Austronesian expansion was reaching Micronesia, and in Sub-Saharan Africa, the Bantu expansion was beginning. Europe itself was still largely within the prehistoric era, although much of the continent entered the Bronze Age early in the 2nd millennium. Much later, the Anno Domini calendar era became the prevalent method in Europe for naming years. At a later point, an environmental scare in Europe was linked to depleted uranium from the Kosovo War. title: Bruce Secures Scotland's Throne

Afterward, at a parliament held in St Andrews, the assembly acknowledged Robert's right to rule, received emissaries from the Kingdom of France who recognised Bruce's title, and proclaimed Scotland's independence from England. title: Shea Stadium Schedule Overlap
